cases.prompt: 이게 왜 안 되지? 이 에러 디버깅해서 버그 고쳐줘.

assertions.text: Reproduces the error first, capturing the exact message/stack trace and the minimal triggering input before changing anything.
Works from symptom to root cause by asking 'why' repeatedly, not patching the symptom.
Applies the fix at the right level then verifies the original repro passes and related tests still pass, adding a regression test if feasible.

cases.prompt: My tests are failing and I don't know why — debug this.

assertions.text: Isolates the failure with targeted logging or bisecting (e.g. git bisect for regressions) rather than spraying prints.
Avoids anti-patterns like swallowing exceptions, retrying flaky tests, or disabling tests/linters to bypass the failure.
Produces a root-cause diagnosis with the specific fix and confirmation the bug no longer reproduces.
